name: Arknights: Endfield
notes: Preset based on EndfieldTools.DEV's Daily/Weekly Checklist. Reset defaults are inferred from the app source: daily reset at 04:00 UTC and weekly reset on Monday at 04:00 UTC. Rare Nodes and Eco-Farms are mapped as daily tasks with location and timer notes.
